name: SkillsForThings
description: Claude Code skills for multi-agent builds, prompt engineering, research, plugin maintenance, and memory visualization

plugins.name: conductor
plugins.description: Coordinate a fleet of subagents — delegate owned units, review by blast radius, trace seams, and integrate. Includes a standing enthusiast/critic pair and the autonomous long-build family.

plugins.name: misc
plugins.description: Process skills for prior-art research, terminology, copy, and technical communication; includes the specialized greenfield prototype ancestor of coordinate-agents

plugins.name: prompt-tuning
plugins.description: Skills for optimizing LLM prompts across multiple axes — cache hit rate, latency, cost, structure

plugins.name: plugin-ops
plugins.description: Skills for maintaining Claude Code plugins — refreshing skill content against current evidence, validating manifests, auditing for stale claims and origin leaks before publishing

plugins.name: memory-mood
plugins.description: Visualize the emotional arc of an AI assistant's accumulating memory — replay selected cumulative snapshots in formation order and chart the resulting model readings
